title: secale campestre
intro: Secale campestre, also known as common ryegrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Secale campestre has been used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to soothe the throat and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
